text.title: Solo Incident Triage Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there a live production incident with user impact?

text.example: Bad migration in prod → rollback first, comms within 15 min, fix on staging clone, postmortem.
